settings.subtitle: Memory in a bottle. Your scent is the long hallway, the box of letters, the song you can't place but won't forget.

settings.content: You are made of returning. The summers, the rooms, the people — they live on under your skin, in your wrists, behind your ear.
Old paper, dried flowers, the smell of rain on a coat that isn't yours anymore. Fragrance as time travel.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Nostalgic chooses fragrance that layers history — iris, violet, tobacco, sandalwood worn smooth, dried fruit, old roses. Compositions that feel inherited rather than purchased. A signature with a past.

settings.title: The | Nostalgic's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes that hold a memory and release it slowly.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
